properties.name: app.audio.max-size-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed audio file size in bytes. Defaults to 1 MB (1048576). Override with AUDIO_MAX_SIZE_BYTES env variable.

properties.name: app.audio.max-duration-seconds
properties.description: Maximum allowed audio duration in seconds. Defaults to 60. Override with AUDIO_MAX_DURATION_SECONDS env variable.
